title: admin check doesn't detect inconsistency when index contains generated column
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
CREATE TABLE cache (
  cache_key varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  updated_at datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  expired_at datetime GENERATED ALWAYS AS (if(expires > 0, date_add(updated_at, interval expires second), date_add(updated_at, interval 99 year))) VIRTUAL,
  expires int(11),
  PRIMARY KEY (cache_key) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY idx_c_on_expired_at (expired_at)
);

INSERT INTO cache(cache_key, expires) VALUES ('2001-01-01 11:11:11', 60) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE expires = expires + 1;
select sleep(5);
INSERT INTO cache(cache_key, expires) VALUES ('2001-01-01 11:11:11', 60) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE expires = expires + 1;
```

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

These SQLs can generate data inconsistency and `admin check` should this.

See details of this bug in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/56829#issuecomment-2456356173

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

`admin check` passed.

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
poc: updated_at datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
expired_at datetime GENERATED ALWAYS AS (if(expires > 0, date_add(updated_at, interval expires second), date_add(updated_at, interval 99 year))) VIRTUAL,
INSERT INTO cache(cache_key, expires) VALUES ('2001-01-01 11:11:11', 60) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE expires = expires + 1;
key_bug_features: admin check fails with generated column in index
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_cache (cache_key varchar(512) NOT NULL, updated_at datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, expired_at datetime GENERATED ALWAYS AS (IF(expires > 0, DATE_ADD(updated_at, INTERVAL expires SECOND), DATE_ADD(updated_at, INTERVAL 99 YEAR))) VIRTUAL, expires int(11), PRIMARY KEY (cache_key), KEY idx_expired_at (expired_at));
INSERT INTO test_cache(cache_key, expires) VALUES ('2023-01-01 10:00:00', 120) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE expires = expires + 2;
INSERT INTO test_cache(cache_key, expires) VALUES ('2023-01-01 10:00:00', NULL) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE expires = COALESCE(expires, 0) + 1;
SELECT * FROM test_cache WHERE expired_at < NOW();
DELETE FROM test_cache WHERE cache_key = '2023-01-01 10:00:00' AND expires IS NOT NULL;
